group_id.description: A unique identifier for a group

member_id.description: A unique identifier for a group member

entity_beg_seq_id.description: An identifier for the monomer in the entity sequence at which this segment of the alignment begins.

rcsb_description.text: An identifier for the monomer in the entity sequence at which this segment of the alignment begins.

length.description: The length of this segment of the alignment.

rcsb_description.text: The length of this segment of the alignment.

ref_beg_seq_id.description: An identifier for the monomer in the reference sequence at which this segment of the alignment begins.

rcsb_description.text: An identifier for the monomer in the reference sequence at which this segment of the alignment begins.

member_type.description: Whether the group member id corresponds to a PDB or a CSM entry.
